title: How Claude Code's Creator ACTUALLY Automates his work
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Boris Cherny, creator of Claude Code, uses Claude Skills to automate work. The video covers decision frameworks for creating skills, three amplification strategies (agents, hooks, loops), and highlights underutilized features in Claude Code.
